title: T-074 — UI: NutritionScreen (NutritionScreen prototype) — 7-row table + traffic-light + Nutri-Score (NPD-h)
prompt:
# T-074 — Nutrition screen UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.2 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md nutrition_screen
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx:4-81 (NutritionScreen)

## Goal
Server Component page /(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]?stage=nutrition rendering 7-row per-100g + per-portion table, traffic-light bars, allergen card, Nutri-Score grade letter — read-only.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/nutrition/page.tsx (RSC) reads nutrition_profiles + nutri_score_results + nutrition_allergens via Drizzle.
2. NutritionScreen component renders 7-row table (energy/fat/saturates/carbs/sugars/protein/salt) with traffic-light bars + per-portion column + Nutri-Score grade letter A-E + allergen card.
3. Export buttons (CSV stub functional, label PDF stub disabled with tooltip).
4. RTL parity test against prototype.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/nutrition/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/nutrition/_components/nutrition-screen.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/nutrition/_components/__tests__/nutrition-screen.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production NutritionScreen renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx:4-81 (NutritionScreen), then it has the same 7-row nutrient table + traffic-light bars + Nutri-Score grade card + allergen card using shadcn Table + Badge + Card primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
2. Given a nutri_score_results.grade='B' is returned, when the page renders, then a large 'B' letter Badge variant green is shown per §17.11.2 grade rendering
3. Given the user clicks Export CSV, when the file downloads, then it contains 7 rows + header (nutrient, per_100g, per_portion) per §17.11.2 export contract

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/nutrition-screen.test.tsx asserting parity + grade rendering + CSV export before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test nutrition-screen'

## Risk red lines
- Do not enable label PDF export in this task (deferred Phase C4)
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not use HTML <table> in place of shadcn Table
